actual: 10 seeds unlock 26.2% of citation graph forward (3-hop), 59.1% reverse, 71.8% combined. Info budget +59% (14KB seeds on 24KB bootstrap). Seed internal density 12.2%. But forward reachability requires citation-chain following — without structural enforcement of chain traversal, effective reachability drops to hop-0+hop-1 = 4.8%. Discovery enforcement (v8.1) addresses seed discovery; citation-chain enforcement is the next structural gap. Domain coverage: 8/30 reachable at 3-hop from meta-heavy seeds.
diff: Expected >=20% boot acceleration: CANNOT MEASURE (no v8.1 children yet). Expected seed citation >0%: STRUCTURAL ANALYSIS supports but requires empirical test. KEY SURPRISE: theoretical reachability (26.2%) vs practical reachability (~4.8%) gap reveals citation-chain enforcement as the binding constraint, not seed selection. L-1260 (discovery) is necessary but insufficient — children must also follow citation chains. Prediction: add citation-chain following instruction to genesis CLAUDE.md bootstrap step.
